title: Velvet Lantern Room
prompt: Create an original neo-soul track at 78 BPM in E-flat minor, clean and public-safe. Groove: a pocketed neo-soul groove with laid-back swing. Drums: soft kick, rim snare, brushed hats, ghost notes. Bass: play a rounded melodic line with syncopated rests. Instruments: Rhodes-style electric piano, clean guitar voicings, muted organ; add original samples like original room texture, breath layers. Vocal texture: velvety soul lead with tasteful harmonies, restrained runs; no lyric writing, violence, hate, or explicit content. Structure: intro, verse/section A, pre-chorus/build, chorus/drop, bridge/breakdown, final lift, outro. Build adds additional percussion, harmony doubles, chorus brings a memorable clean hook, fuller drums, bridge uses stripped drums, bass pauses. Production: warm saturation, subtle stereo movement. Mix/master: clean loudness, controlled sub, smooth highs.
exclude: specific artist references, copyrighted melodies, copied soul progressions, excessive vocal runs, explicit lyrics, trap hi-hats, EDM drop, over-polished pop sheen, muddy chords, weak snare

Drums: soft kick, snare with body, claps, tambourine, ghost notes. Bass: walk warmly through the chord changes. Instruments: piano, organ, clean guitar, warm brass-like pads, and gentle strings; add original samples like original choir-like hum textures, handclaps. Vocal texture: soulful lead with layered background harmonies; no lyric writing, violence, hate, or explicit content. Structure: intro, verse/section A, pre-chorus/build, chorus/drop, bridge/breakdown, final lift, outro. Build adds small call-and-response elements, chorus brings a smooth chorus section, bridge uses minimal chords, reversed samples. Production: dry rhythmic focus, smooth vocal processing. Mix/master: strong groove presence, transparent mids.
exclude: specific artist references, copyrighted melodies, copied gospel standards, church song quotations, excessive vocal runs, EDM drop, trap hi-hats, fake crowd chants, muddy organ, weak snare

title: Warm Circuit Pocket
prompt: Create an original funk-soul track at 96 BPM in A minor, clean and public-safe. Groove: a tight funk-soul pocket with syncopated drums. Drums: crisp kick, dry snare, ghost notes, tight hats, claps. Bass: play a rubbery melodic funk line with short rests. Instruments: wah-style guitar, clav-like keys, horn-like synth stabs, electric piano; add original samples like original vocal shouts, handclaps. Vocal texture: gritty but clean soul vocal texture; no lyric writing, violence, hate, or explicit content. Structure: intro, verse/section A, pre-chorus/build, chorus/drop, bridge/breakdown, final lift, outro. Build adds additional percussion, harmony doubles, chorus brings a memorable clean hook, fuller drums, bridge uses stripped drums, bass pauses. Production: warm saturation, subtle stereo movement. Mix/master: clean loudness, controlled sub, smooth highs.
exclude: specific artist references, copyrighted melodies, copied funk riffs, explicit lyrics, slap bass overload, EDM drop, trap hats, fake crowd chants, muddy guitars, brittle cymbals
